page.title: Calls
page.description: Review recent calls, browse transcripts, and listen to recorded audio.
page.selectCall: Select a call to review the transcript.

table.empty: No calls match the current filters.

panel.title: Recent Calls
panel.description: Review captured calls, open transcripts, and download the recorded audio.
panel.noCalls: No calls have been captured yet.
panel.noBusinessDescription: Create a business to review recordings and transcripts.

transcript.title: Call Transcript
transcript.description: Review the saved caller and assistant turns from {{date}}.
transcript.emptyDescription: Select a call to review the saved conversation.
transcript.descriptionWithDate: Review the saved caller and assistant turns from {{date}}.
transcript.descriptionEmpty: Select a call to review the saved conversation.
transcript.noSegments: No transcript segments are available for this call yet.

outcome.label: Outcome
outcome.scheduling: Caller started scheduling, but no appointment was confirmed.
outcome.schedulingWithService: Caller discussed scheduling {{serviceName}}, but no appointment was confirmed.
outcome.schedulingWithServiceAndTime: Caller discussed scheduling {{serviceName}} for {{startsAt}}, but no appointment was confirmed.
outcome.messageTaken: Caller left a message for follow-up.
outcome.voicemail: Call ended in voicemail or message capture.
outcome.busy: Call ended because the line was busy.
outcome.canceled: Call was canceled before a final outcome was captured.
outcome.completed: Call completed, but no booking outcome was captured.
outcome.technicalIssue: Call ended because of a technical issue before a final outcome was captured.
outcome.transferBusy: Transfer was attempted, but the destination line was busy.
outcome.transferFailed: Transfer was attempted, but it did not complete successfully.
outcome.none: Caller asked questions, but no final outcome was captured yet.
